pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade jacoco-maven-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may fail to instrument or run on Java 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-checkstyle-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Checkstyle versions may fail to parse or run on Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports the 'release' flag and Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not support the 'release' flag or Java 21 compilation correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-war-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older WAR plugin versions may have compatibility issues with Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated 'source' and 'target' compiler configuration with the modern 'release' flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' for cross-compilation and module path handling in newer JDKs.
